goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and should 'include free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel' and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should 'leave after 10:45' and should go to 'birmingham new street'.
Make sure you get 'price', 'train ID', and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should include free wifi
Make sure you get star of the hotel and address
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on wednesday and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave after 10:45 and should go to birmingham new street
Make sure you get price, train ID, and travel time
